proven: baseline: program builds, deploys, and initializes
Anchor TS test harness compiles and runs one assertion
PDAs: derivation, canonical bump, and the seeds constraint
SPL token transfer proven without the @solana/spl-token JS dependency
Cross-program invocation (CPI): invoke the Token program from my program
Anchor account constraints: has_one and ownership/authority validation
Custom errors: require! and graceful failure with named error codes
Account lifecycle: rent, space, realloc, and close
